character_buff.name: Gatling Empowerment
character_buff.description: With your knowledge about gatling structures, you can increase the shooting power of your team members and allow yourself to build fast.

effects: For your team, the following applies:
Critical Rate, Critical Damage and Monster Damage +10%

skills.name: Detection
skills.description: Reveals invisible characters and locates hidden objects.

skills.name: Critical Disease
skills.description: Builds a trap that releases a poisonous cloud of smoke when triggered.

skills.name: Invisible String
skills.description: Set a booby trap that deals Physical Damage to enemies. (Also applicable to flying monsters.)

skills.name: Explosion
skills.description: Sets an explosive trap that blocks attacks from several enemies at the same time.

skills.name: Fence Construction
skills.description: Builds a fence that obstructs enemy movement and prevents them from advancing.

skills.name: Cannon-Turret Const.
skills.description: Constructs a cannon-turret that automatically attacks enemies.

skills.name: Safety Ward Const.
skills.description: Creates a protective ward that defends the characters within.

skills.name: Regen. Ward Const.
skills.description: Creates a regenerative ward that continuously restores the HP of characters within.

skills.name: S.C.-Turret Const.
skills.description: Builds a Siegecannon-Turret that is able to attack several enemies simultaneously.

skills.name: Fence Construction
skills.description: Builds a fence that obstructs enemy movement and prevents them from advancing.

skills.name: Spike Trap
skills.description: Constructs a trap which fires a sharp projectile.

skills.name: Rotating Blade Const.
skills.description: Manufactures a whirling sword that attacks adjacent enemies.

skills.name: Concen. Ward Const.
skills.description: Constructs a ward that increases power.

skills.name: Great RB Construction
skills.description: Manufactures a whirling sword that attacks adjacent ground and airborne enemies.

skills.name: Defensive Tool
skills.description: Builds a structure which recovers HP of nearby structures. Only 1 unit available.

effects: Increases structure HP recovery and frequency of recovery according to DEX stats
Increases structure HP recovery and frequency of recovery according to DEX stats

skills.name: Enhanced Rotating Blade Build
skills.description: Builds an enhanced rotating blade which can use a stronger attack. Only 3 units available.

skills.name: Detection Ward Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which can detect nearby invisible enemy and flying enemies. Only 2 units available.

effects: Cancel invisible status of enemy when it detects and also inflicts [Web] skill on the enemy
Cancel invisible status of enemy when it detects and also inflicts [Web] skill on the enemy

skills.name: Electric Punisher Construction
skills.description: Builds a turret which recognizes an enemy to shoot an electronic ray of light. Only 1 unit available.

effects: Increases the chance to use [Electric Punisher] skill according to DEX stats
Increases the chance to use [Electric Punisher] skill according to DEX stats

skills.name: Regenerator Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which recovers HP of nearby friendly force quickly. Only 2 unit available.

effects: Increases HP recovery, frequency of recovery according to DEX stats
Increases HP recovery, frequency of recovery according to DEX stats

stances.name: Ancient Tactics

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

effects: Remove harmful effect of own character
Remove harmful effect of own character

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

effects: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.
Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 2% of extra [None]

skills.name: Encourage
skills.description: Dramatically enhances the offensive abilities of team members. Cannot be stacked with certain buffs.

skills.name: Pulsate
skills.description: Increases the speed of the designated ally.

skills.name: Meditate
skills.description: Enhances the ATK of the designated ally according to their combat attributes.

effects: Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +5 according to the active stance or attribute.
Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +14 according to the active stance or attribute.
Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +15 according to the active stance or attribute.
Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +16 according to the active stance or attribute.

skills.name: Netherworld
skills.description: Maximizes the offensive capabilities of the selected character by leveraging their strengths.

skills.name: Additional Assist
skills.description: Installs a tactical trap. Upon casting, reduces the cooldown of all of your characters except [Additional Assist].

effects: The trap detects hidden enemies within 15m and self-destructs towards enemies within 6m
Applies harmful debuff and Increases cooldown of enemy when hit.
